title: Benalmadena Fishing Charter: Full-Day Costs & Tips for 2026
html:
A full-day fishing charter from Benalmadena Marina costs between 400 and 1,200 EUR, depending on boat size and crew. These private trips target Mediterranean species such as dentex and amberjack in the Bay of Málaga. BoatHire24 connects you with local skippers for a personalised day on the water.

Where to set off in Benalmadena

All full-day charters depart from Puerto Marina Benalmádena, a modern harbour with full facilities.

From there you can head towards the Costa del Sol coastline. Nearby landmarks include the town of Fuengirola to the west and Torremolinos to the east. Several trips run south to the protected waters of Cabo Pino or out past the Bay of Málaga towards the open Mediterranean. Many skippers also troll along the edge of the Punta de Torrox reef system, about 10 nautical miles offshore.

How much does a fishing charter cost in Benalmadena?

A shared full-day trip starts at 90 EUR per person, while a private charter for up to six people costs around 800 EUR.

Prices vary by boat type and season. For the latest offers, browse the full range of skippered charters in Benalmadena on BoatHire24. In peak months, book at least two weeks ahead to secure your preferred date.

Which boat to rent for fishing in Benalmadena?

The best fishing boats are purpose-built sportsfishers or versatile motor yachts with rod holders and bait tanks.

  1. Sportsfisher (e.g. Axopar 28), ideal for fast-run trolling, up to 6 guests, from 700 EUR full day.
  2. Flybridge motor yacht (e.g. Princess F70), comfortable for family groups, up to 10 guests, from 1,200 EUR full day. See the Princess F70 charter page for details.
  3. Open motorboat (e.g. Astondoa 27), good for light-tackle fishing, up to 4 guests, from 500 EUR full day.
  4. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 42), stable platform for drift fishing, up to 8 guests, from 900 EUR full day.
  5. Skippered rib (e.g. Maiora 34), fast and nimble for experienced anglers, up to 5 guests, from 600 EUR full day.

Cost breakdown for fishing charters in Benalmadena

Prices range from 90 EUR shared to 1,200 EUR private, with fuel and crew included in most cases.

  • Shared tour (up to 8 people): 90, 120 EUR per person, includes 8 hours fishing.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4-hour, up to 4 people): 250, 400 EUR.
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 8 people): 900, 1,100 EUR.
  • Luxury crewed yacht full-day (up to 10 people): 1,000, 1,200 EUR.

When is the best season for fishing in Benalmadena?

High season runs from June to September, when sea temperatures reach 22, 24°C and bluefish are abundant.

The local levante wind can pick up in July, but most skippers adapt by working lee shores. You do not need a licence for a skippered charter; the operator holds the required permits and confirms exact requirements before departure.

For early-season fishing, come in May: the waters are calm, baitfish are schooling, and you have a good chance of catching European seabass near the Fuengirola reefs.

At a glance

  • Price band: 90, 1,200 EUR
  • Peak months: June, September
  • Trip length: 8 hours full day
  • Capacity: Up to 10 guests on private yachts
  • Currency: EUR
  • Distance to reef: 10 nautical miles to Punta de Torrox

Questions about boat rental in Benalmadena

Do I need a private fishing licence on a charter in Benalmadena?

No, the skipper holds the necessary permits and you fish under their licence.

What species can I catch on a full-day trip from Benalmadena?

Common catches include dentex, amberjack, seabass, and sometimes bluefin tuna near the Bay of Málaga.

Is the catch included in the charter price and can I keep it?

Most skippers allow you to keep some fish, but confirm the policy before booking.

How far offshore do full-day charters typically go from Benalmadena?

Charters usually cover 8, 12 nautical miles, reaching the deeper waters off Cabo Pino or Fuengirola.

To book a fully crewed fishing trip in Benalmadena, compare skippers and vessels on the BoatHire24 marketplace. If you own a boat, you can also list it on BoatHire24 to reach anglers visiting the Costa del Sol. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Benalmadena or list your own.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Benalmadena and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
